_comment: Register LodeDB as local memory for an MCP-capable coding agent. This is the fallback form for when 'lodedb' is not on PATH (for example installed into a uv project): the command runs the CLI through uv against your clone. Replace both absolute paths. After 'pip install lodedb' the CLI is on PATH, so use the simpler form: 'command' is 'lodedb' with args ['mcp', '--path', '<data dir>'].
